Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 126 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 54 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Scientists observe an immune signaling complex forming inside cells 86 upvotes, 7 comments
  4. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 29 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 85 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 443 upvotes, 125 comments
  7. Plague Ships (2020) 34 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 522 upvotes, 161 comments
  9. Some Unusual Trees 241 upvotes, 69 comments
  10. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 106 upvotes, 27 comments
  11. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 24 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 29 upvotes, 6 comments
  13. The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House 150 upvotes, 54 comments
  14. Why the most valuable things you know are things you cannot say 121 upvotes, 42 comments
  15. Components of a Coding Agent 145 upvotes, 55 comments
  16. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 334 upvotes, 150 comments
  18. IBM 3270 Information Display System: Color and Programmed Symbols (1979) [pdf] 30 upvotes, 8 comments
  19. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 334 upvotes, 173 comments
  20. Sopwith – 1984 Game (2000) 72 upvotes, 33 comments
  21. Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta 703 upvotes, 467 comments
  22. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 113 upvotes, 63 comments
  23. Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years 352 upvotes, 226 comments
  24. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 1026 upvotes, 777 comments
  25. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 115 upvotes, 73 comments
  26. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 23 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future 55 upvotes, 46 comments
  28. Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model 133 upvotes, 138 comments
  29. Demand for autism care is soaring 12 upvotes, 7 comments
  30. Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 5 April 2026. Source here.
